Review / Feedback: The setup was surprisingly smooth. Linking my wallet only took a few seconds, and the whole process felt really secure and professional.
I was impressed by how fast the funds moved. The interface is super clean and it’s easy to see exactly when the aid arrives in the wallet.
The onboarding process was very straightforward. I didn't get lost once, and the steps were easy to follow even if you aren't a tech expert.
I really appreciate the focus on privacy. It feels good knowing I can access aid without having to worry about my personal info being exposed.
The mobile experience is great. Navigating the dashboard is easy, and it works perfectly on my phone without any lag.
